long_description:
[COM]-RIAS-etcd_cpu_consumption_exceeded [OSA] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/etcd-etcd-cluster-troubleshooting.html
TIP Situation: Observed conatiner-saturation-cpu issue in rias-etcd
TIP Short Description: K8s Pod CPU Consumption Quota
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-rias-etcd:::rias-ng-etcd-jp-osa-osa-prod:microservice:etcd-cluster-29nx2sc8dj
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum by (kube_cluster_name, kube_pod_name) (max_over_time(sysdig_container_cpu_quota_used_percent{kube_pod_name =~ "etcd-cluster.*"}[10m])) > 95 = 100.29
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'rias-ng-etcd-jp-osa-osa-prod' and kube_pod_name = 'etcd-cluster-29nx2sc8dj'

Time:             12/05/2025 03:23 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-osa.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/ee162ec9-ba7d-4c3e-b399-7cb2badb0efb?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F11544402%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [COM]-RIAS-etcd_cpu_consumption_exceeded [OSA]
Description:  rias-etcd CPU consumption exceeding quota
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum by (kube_cluster_name, kube_pod_name) (max_over_time(sysdig_container_cpu_quota_used_percent{kube_pod_name =~ "etcd-cluster.*"}[10m])) > 95
Duration: 15 m
